start.message:
Send your Markdown text in a single message.
I will publish it to Telegraph and return links.

Inline mode: {bot_username} <markdown>
(Telegram allows only 256 characters after the bot name in inline — for longer text, message me here.)

Personal account: /myaccount status|on|off|rotate
error.personal_disabled: Personal accounts are disabled by admin. Shared account mode is active.
myaccount.status.none:
Mode: shared.
No personal account yet.
Command: /myaccount on
myaccount.off.ok: Shared mode enabled. Publishing uses shared account.
myaccount.rotate.ok:
Personal account token has been rotated.
Current mode: {mode}
error.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please retry in one minute.
error.max_md_size: Text is too large: {size} characters. Limit: {limit}.
error.publish_failed: Failed to publish to Telegraph. Please try again later.
inline.empty.title: Enter Markdown text
inline.empty.text: Enter Markdown after the bot username (inline is limited to 256 characters by Telegram). Long texts: open a private chat with the bot and send the message there.
inline.rate.title: Too many requests
inline.rate.text: Too many requests. Please retry in one minute.
inline.max.title: Text is too large
inline.max.text: Text is too large: {size} characters. Limit: {limit}.
inline.cached.title: Publish to Telegraph (cache)
inline.publish_error.title: Failed to publish
inline.publish_error.text: Failed to publish to Telegraph. Please try again later.
inline.ok.title: Publish to Telegraph
